websites.name: Geodle
websites.description: Wordle but geography — guess the mystery country using flag and fact clues. Features daily challenges, path mode, and multiple game modes.

websites.name: MapMyWeather
websites.description: Interactive weather app that maps real-time conditions worldwide. Search any location to view temperature, conditions, and forecasts on an intuitive map interface.

websites.name: Battle-Waves
websites.description: PVE combat game with wave-based enemy encounters. Fight progressively harder enemies, upgrade abilities, and survive as long as possible.

websites.name: Battleship
websites.description: Classic Battleship game with multiple modes: play against AI, local two-player, or try reversed/modified rule sets.

websites.name: Chatrise
websites.description: Real-time web messenger with global chat rooms, direct messaging, online status, and responsive design for desktop and mobile.

websites.name: CentuarAI
websites.description: Browser-based chess AI with multiple difficulty levels (Beginner to Master), move analysis, undo/redo, and real-time board evaluation.
